subcodes.first_line: O thou minstrel in the garden of mystic knowledge! In these days, that which is the supreme cause for the exaltation of God's Cause and its triumph [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مغنی در گلستان عرفان در این اوقات آنچه سبب اعظم ارتفاع امرالله و امتناع
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
